name: Rich and Gooey Honey Nut Diamonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9 by 13-inch baking pan.
3. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth and fluffy with an electric mixer.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Sift flour and baking powder, then add to the mixture. Mix slowly on low speed, then mix well on medium speed.
6. Form a slight rim over the crust mixture, prick thoroughly with a fork.
7. Bake for 15 minutes until set but still colorless. Remove from oven and cool completely.
1. In a saucepan over medium-high heat, stir together butter, brown sugar, white sugar, and honey.
2. Bring to a boil for 3 minutes.
3. Add pecans and return pan to heat. Stir in heavy cream.
4. Mix until smooth. Pour filling into the prebaked crust, starting at the corners and spreading to cover completely.
5. Place on baking sheet to prevent bottom from overbaking.
6. Bake for 25 minutes, then rotate pan and bake an additional 15-20 minutes (total of 40-45 minutes).
7. Middle should jiggle slightly but set when cooled.
8. Cut into 1-inch diamonds.
9. Dust with powdered sugar if desired and place a pecan half in the center of each.
